creator: john@jmarshall.id.au
text:
There have been no updates to the mail-archive collection on
cvsup-master since 23-May-2010.  There are usually updates for this
collection on each hourly synchronization.

I posted to hubs@ on 26-May-2010 and have seen no response.  I also
forwarded that posting to mirror-admin@, postmaster@ and mailman@ on
28-May-2010 and have seen no response.

Perhaps a PR will help this report find its way to someone who can fix
the problem?

Fix: 

No workaround.

I'm guessing a feed job is broken?
How-To-Repeat: 
(Note: Timestamps are UTC +10:00)
